access_token.description: Zoom OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Zoom API base URL override for tests or proxies.

user_id.description: Zoom user id or email the 'meetings' and 'webinars' streams are scoped to (required for those streams; substituted into the user-scoped path).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-300); sent as the 'page_size' query param.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
